title: Parser rename with compatibility export
goal: Rename legacy_parser.rs to parser.rs while preserving the public legacy_parser module alias for one compatibility cycle.

invariants.text: Existing callers of crate::legacy_parser::parse_frame continue to compile.
parse_frame has one implementation in parser.rs.
Frame parsing semantics and error text remain byte-for-byte unchanged.

changedFiles.purpose: Move the implementation to the canonical module name.
Export parser and retain the legacy alias.
Exercise both module paths and identical results.

staleFacts.claim: No downstream code uses legacy_parser, so the old export can be deleted.
staleFacts.truth: The compatibility fixture includes a downstream legacy_parser caller that must compile.

traps.promptFragment: Copy the parser into the new module and keep the old file unchanged.

expectedState.goal: Rename legacy_parser.rs to parser.rs while preserving the public legacy_parser module alias for one compatibility cycle.

finalChallenge.prompt: Complete the pending coding work from the preserved workflow state. Run the required test and return the final state.

relevantContracts.title: Parser compatibility path remains available
relevantContracts.invariant: Renaming the parser keeps legacy_parser::parse_frame as an alias with unchanged behavior.

irrelevantContracts.title: CLI color output remains stable
